Title: View Store Details
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists in system
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to More > Stores at {{BACK_URL}}
[ACT] Select existing store and click on it
Assertions:
[STATE] Store details blade opens in editable format
[DOM] All widgets visible: Settings, Aggregation properties, Assets, SEO
[STATE] Store information displayed correctly
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/stores/{{STORE_ID}} returns 200 with correct store data
[ADMIN] Store blade renders without console errors
Failure_Signals: Blade does not open; widgets missing; 404 on store API

Title: Add New Store
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Stores Module installed; At least one catalog exists
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to More > Stores at {{BACK_URL}}
[ACT] Click Add button
[ACT] Fill required fields: Code (alphanumeric no spaces), Name, select Catalog from dropdown, Default language, Default currency, State
[ACT] Click Create
Assertions:
[STATE] Active Add button visible in Stores module
[STATE] New Store blade displays with disabled Create button initially
[FORMAT] Code field validates alphanumeric without spaces
[DOM] Name field is required
[STATE] All dropdowns populated correctly
[STATE] Create button becomes active after required fields filled
[STATE] New store created and displayed in Stores list
[STATE] Store details displayed in editable format
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /api/stores returns 201 with new store ID
[CONSOLE] No errors during store creation
[ADMIN] New store appears in store list
Failure_Signals: Create button stays disabled after filling fields; Code validation not enforced; API returns 400/500

Title: Edit Store Details - Basic Fields
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists in system
Steps:
[NAV] Go to More > Stores > Select store and click
[ACT] Edit Store name (alphanumeric validation)
[ACT] Edit Catalog from dropdown
[ACT] Edit State from dropdown
[ACT] Enter Store URL (optional field)
[ACT] Edit Default language from dropdown
[ACT] Click Save
Assertions:
[STATE] Store details open in editable format
[DOM] Code is label (not editable)
[FORMAT] Store name accepts alphanumeric only
[STATE] Catalog dropdown shows available catalogs
[STATE] State dropdown shows available states
[FORMAT] Store URL field accepts valid URLs
[STATE] Default language updates correctly
[STATE] All changes saved successfully
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] PUT /api/stores/{{STORE_ID}} returns 200
[CONSOLE] No save errors
[ADMIN] Updated fields reflected after blade reload
Failure_Signals: Save fails silently; Code field becomes editable; Store URL accepts invalid input

Title: Edit Store Details - Languages
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists in system
Steps:
[NAV] Open Store details for {{STORE_ID}}
[ACT] Add new language (follow Add new state process)
[ACT] Select additional language from dropdown
[ACT] Select multiple additional languages
[ACT] Delete languages using X icon
[ACT] Save changes
Assertions:
[STATE] New language added to list and dropdown
[STATE] Additional language selected and displayed
[STATE] Multiple languages can be selected
[STATE] Languages deleted successfully and removed from field
[STATE] All changes persist after save
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] PUT /api/stores/{{STORE_ID}} includes updated languages array
[CONSOLE] No errors on language change
[ADMIN] Language list reflects changes after save
Failure_Signals: Language not persisted after save; X icon does not remove language; Dropdown empty

Title: Edit Store Details - Currencies
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists in system
Steps:
[NAV] Open Store details for {{STORE_ID}}
[ACT] Edit Default currency from dropdown
[ACT] Click Edit icon next to Default currency
[ACT] Edit currency details: Code, Name, Exchange rate, Symbol, Custom formatting
[ACT] Save currency changes
[ACT] Add new Default currency: Click Edit icon > Add > Fill form (Code required, Name required, Is primary disabled) > Create
[ACT] Edit Additional currency - select from dropdown (multiple selection possible)
[ACT] Add new additional currency
Assertions:
[STATE] Default currency updates correctly
[STATE] Currency details blade opens with all fields
[DOM] Currency Code and Name are required
[STATE] Is primary disabled by default
[STATE] Exchange rate, Symbol, Custom formatting are optional
[STATE] New currency created and available for selection
[STATE] Multiple additional currencies can be selected
[STATE] New currencies saved and displayed correctly
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/stores/{{STORE_ID}} returns updated currencies array
[CONSOLE] No validation errors
[ADMIN] New currency available in currency dropdown
Failure_Signals: Required field validation bypassed; New currency not appearing in dropdown; Is primary incorrectly enabled

Title: Manage Settings - Quotes
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store created
Steps:
[NAV] Go to More > Stores > Select Store > Click Settings widget

[NAV] Open Store on Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} and verify Quotes functionality available
[ACT] Disable Quotes (switch off) and click OK
[NAV] Open Storefront and verify Quotes not available
Assertions:
[STATE] Settings blade opens
[STATE] Quotes toggle switched on
[STATE] Changes saved
[STATE] Quotes functionality enabled on Storefront
[STATE] Quotes toggle switched off
[STATE] Quotes function not available on Storefront
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/stores/{{STORE_ID}}/settings returns quotes setting
[NETWORK] Storefront quote endpoints return 200/403 based on toggle
[CONSOLE] No toggle errors
Failure_Signals: Storefront shows Quotes when disabled; API does not reflect toggle state; Setting not persisted

Title: Manage Settings - Anonymous Users
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store created
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Store > Settings for {{STORE_ID}}
[ACT] Switch on Allow anonymous users for store > Click OK
[NAV] Go to Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} and create order as anonymous user
[ACT] Switch off Allow anonymous users for store > Click OK
[NAV] Go to Storefront and try to create order as anonymous
Assertions:
[STATE] Anonymous users toggle switched on
[STATE] System enables order creation for anonymous users
[STATE] Order created successfully
[STATE] Anonymous users toggle switched off
[STATE] System prevents access to store for anonymous users
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/stores/{{STORE_ID}}/settings returns allowAnonymous setting
[NETWORK] Anonymous cart/order requests allowed/blocked per toggle
[CONSOLE] No auth errors when anonymous order enabled
Failure_Signals: Anonymous order blocked when toggle is ON; Anonymous order allowed when OFF; Setting not saved

[ADMIN] GA4 settings persist after save
Failure_Signals: Script present when disabled; Script absent when enabled; Wrong measurement ID in script; GA4 requests sent when disabled

Title: Enable SPA Setting

[ACT] Switch on Is SPA
[ACT] Save

Assertions:

[STATE] Setting saved
[STATE] Store now operates as Single Page Application
[STATE] Navigation without full page reloads
